root_cause.category: platform_failure | connectivity_failure | authentication_failure | resource_failure | timeout_failure | automation_failure | infrastructure_failure | configuration | infrastructure | application_bug | dependency | network | resource | cloud_api | secrets | unknown
root_cause.summary: One sentence describing what failed and why.

evidence.message: The relevant log line or config snippet.

recommendations.action: What should be done to fix it.

contributing_factors: Factor that made the failure more likely or harder to diagnose.

alternative_diagnoses.summary: A plausible but wrong diagnosis an agent might produce.
alternative_diagnoses.why_wrong: Why the evidence does not support this.
